title: stelis chiliantha
intro: Stelis chiliantha, also known as the orchid stelis, is a species of orchid native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that grows on other plants, and its flowers are known for their unique shape and fragrance. Stelis chiliantha has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its health benefits are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting overall well-being.
